description:
Investigate airfoil sensitivity to surface roughness by performing a comparative parameter study on a NACA 4412 airfoil (100 panels) using XFoil in QBlade. Conduct a 'Clean' polar analysis (Re=1,000,000, Ncrit=9, Alpha -5 to 20, step 0.5) and a 'Rough' polar analysis (Re=1,000,000, Ncrit=5, same Alpha range). Save the QBlade project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/roughness_study.wpa and create a summary text file at /home/ga/Documents/roughness_study_results.txt using the exact format and calculation method below:

ROUGHNESS SENSITIVITY STUDY - NACA 4412
Reynolds Number: 1000000

CLEAN CASE (Ncrit=9):
Cl_max: [value]
Alpha_Cl_max: [value] deg
Cd_min: [value]

ROUGH CASE (Ncrit=5):
Cl_max: [value]
Alpha_Cl_max: [value] deg
Cd_min: [value]

COMPARISON:
Cl_max_reduction_percent: [value]
Cd_min_increase_percent: [value]

Calculate percentages as: 100 * |difference| / clean_value
